title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies:
Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hero MotoCorp Digital Technologies!
